scope: development-only; frozen-test labels and metrics excluded
prediction_timing_assumption: Current-month features require predictions after complete month-T reporting is available.
threshold_policy: Select on the first three temporal validation folds; evaluate the fixed threshold on the latest development fold.
preprocessing_policy: All imputation, scaling, and model fitting occur inside a pipeline fitted separately on training rows in each fold.

random_forest.selection_rule: Highest mean PR-AUC on the first three development folds.

hist_gradient_boosting.selection_rule: Highest mean PR-AUC on the first three development folds.

hist_gradient_boosting.selection_rule: Highest mean PR-AUC on the first three development folds.

hist_gradient_boosting.selection_rule: Highest mean PR-AUC on the first three development folds.

imputed_age_current_history_diagnostic.reason: Full-history eligibility removes all missing-age validation rows; current-history eligibility is used only to inspect observed versus imputed age.

unseen_equipment_diagnostic.scope: diagnostic grouped-by-equipment validation; not a replacement for temporal validation
limitations: Equipment groups are disjoint, but this diagnostic does not preserve a production-like temporal cutoff.
It measures transfer to other observed equipment, not performance with zero operational history.
Feature-set history requirements still exclude newly introduced equipment until enough months accumulate.

recommendation.reason: The best random forest improves mean PR-AUC by about 0.004 versus logistic regression, below a practically material gain, while adding complexity.
recommendation.age_policy: Do not prefer age-bearing variants until the apparent unit inconsistency is resolved.
